title: 1. Provider of Clarity
label: The outcome.
description: Enter chaos, deliver understanding. Legacy systems, undefined requirements, failing courses — hand Dan a mess, get back clarity.

title: 2. I Cheat, But I Cheat Fair
label: The method.
description: Build tools that skip tedium through proper engineering — documented, maintainable, ethical optimization.
sourceNote: The Three Stooges, “Healthy, Wealthy and Dumb,” 1938

title: 3. Don’t Fix the Bug, Build the Tool
label: The approach.
description: Don’t solve individual problems; prevent entire categories of problems.

title: 4. I Seek Knowledge Not for Gain, But to Better Understand Myself
label: The motivation.
description: Learn to understand systems and your own thinking, not to pad a resume.
sourceNote: Harry Potter fanfic — password to the Department of Mysteries

title: 5. The Machine to Undo Time After Disaster
label: The role.
description: Tier 3 escalation — forensic engineering to understand what went wrong, then build the tool that prevents it again.
sourceNote: Same fanfic — the artifact guarded behind the password

title: 6. TASBot for [Domain]
label: The creative application.
description: Tool-assisted optimization applied to professional work — understand the rules deeply, then build tools that operate beyond manual precision.
